## Related issue

Closes #

## Outcome

Describe the single observable outcome delivered by this change.

## Scope

- [ ] The change stays within the linked issue.
- [ ] Unrelated refactoring is excluded.
- [ ] Dependencies and architecture decisions are respected.

## Verification

- [ ] Acceptance criteria were checked individually.
- [ ] Behavior changes have tests.
- [ ] Relevant tests pass.
- [ ] Formatting, linting, and type checking pass.
- [ ] Real-model checks are isolated from fast CI when applicable.

Commands and results:

```text
command: result
```

## Privacy and artifacts

- [ ] No analyzed private text, secrets, local model files, or large datasets are included.
- [ ] Offline behavior is preserved.
- [ ] Diagnostics do not expose full analyzed text by default.

## Documentation

- [ ] Public behavior and errors are documented, or no documentation change is required.
- [ ] New production dependencies include a written justification.
- [ ] Known limitations are documented.
